requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據

summary.en: For Eswatini PV inverter projects, safety evidence should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 for power converters used in photovoltaic power systems. SWASA is the national standards authority, while ESERA SSEG or net-metering review and EEC grid-connection review may require proof that the inverter model is safe for the proposed grid-tied installation. Project owners and engineers may request third-party type-test certificates covering the exact inverter family, installation environment, and firmware or hardware configuration.
summary.zh: 埃斯瓦蒂尼光伏逆变器项目的安全证据应围绕光伏电力系统用功率变换器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2准备。SWASA是国家标准机构，ESERA SSEG或净计量审查及EEC并网审查可能要求证明逆变器型号对拟议并网安装是安全的。项目业主和工程师可能要求覆盖具体逆变器系列、安装环境及固件或硬件配置的第三方型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 埃斯瓦蒂尼光伏逆變器項目的安全證據應圍繞光伏電力系統用功率轉換器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2準備。SWASA是國家標準機構，ESERA SSEG或淨計量審查及EEC併網審查可能要求證明逆變器型號對擬議併網安裝是安全的。項目業主和工程師可能要求覆蓋具體逆變器系列、安裝環境及韌體或硬體配置的第三方型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
ESERA SSEG / net-metering and EEC grid-connection documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter safety evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004, supported by domestic CQC, CGC, or CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents may demonstrate a mature Chinese compliance baseline, but they are not the same as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence and should not be presented as automatically equivalent for Eswatini market entry, ESERA review, or EEC connection approval.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004，并由国内CQC、CGC或CNAS认可实验室报告支持。这些文件可证明成熟的中国合规基准，但并不等同于IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，不应作为埃斯瓦蒂尼市场进入、ESERA审查或EEC接入批准的自动等效依据提交。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004，並由國內CQC、CGC或CNAS認可實驗室報告支持。這些文件可證明成熟的中國合規基準，但並不等同於IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，不應作為埃斯瓦蒂尼市場進入、ESERA審查或EEC接入批准的自動等效依據提交。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety package should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or reports for the specific inverter model or family. Exporters should verify whether SWASA, ESERA, EEC, or the project owner requires ILAC-recognised laboratory evidence, English-language reports, factory inspection records, or model-family coverage details before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全包时，应补充针对具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2证书或报告。出口商在出货前应核实SWASA、ESERA、EEC或项目业主是否要求ILAC认可实验室证据、英文报告、工厂检查记录或型号系列覆盖细节。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全包時，應補充針對具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2證書或報告。出口商在出貨前應核實SWASA、ESERA、EEC或項目業主是否要求ILAC認可實驗室證據、英文報告、工廠檢查記錄或型號系列覆蓋細節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by SWASA conformity, ESERA SSEG or net-metering review, EEC connection review, or project-owner procurement specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T and NB/T safety evidence supports Chinese domestic certification practice but does not automatically transfer to Eswatini

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A PV inverter supported only by Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 safety evidence should not be treated as automatically acceptable in Eswatini. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the model or family and confirm acceptance with SWASA, ESERA, EEC, and the project owner before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅有中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全证据的光伏逆变器，不应视为在埃斯瓦蒂尼自动可接受。请为型号或系列准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，并在出货或安装前向SWASA、ESERA、EEC和项目业主确认接受性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅有中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004安全證據的光伏逆變器，不應視為在埃斯瓦蒂尼自動可接受。請為型號或系列準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，並在出貨或安裝前向SWASA、ESERA、EEC和項目業主確認接受性。
